{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603230056484D7284AE7F59F1F3C28C\"}"},"total":41},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7503966970696942361","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实我觉得这本书写的很好，木石是一个本性很纯良很憨厚的人，故事剧情非常流畅，但是有一点，不要让庄眉儿当女主，我宁愿后宫文，庄眉儿配不上木石。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747167807,"group_id":"7418918634073902105","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5OSbwToSYZwLASVGCmPyYHsgxeQDYZJZMtuzhZZbQM","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2030165981410467","user_name":"OoooOoooho0"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2030165981410467","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7418918634073902105","book_info":{"abstract":"穆实是一个由猴子养育的孤儿，在猴子重伤之际，为了挽救猴子性命，开始走上修炼之路。修仙之路，道阻且长，既有魑魅魍魉，妖魔鬼怪，也要面对种种险恶诡谲的世道人心，这个出身卑微的孩子，如何走出自己的修仙之路……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/p2obb5fb2b32691c9301b6bfd783daa1867~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"晨雨初停","author_id":"","book_id":"7418918634073902105","book_name":"各走各的修仙路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCateg
